memory.summary: On November 26th, Andy had an additional encounter with Leo at a museum around 3 AM where they discussed AI and Andy's music project. After running late from their usual spot, Andy found out that Leo had been busking since early morning and heard his tunes at the park. They decided to meet for a coffee discussion about their ideas on next Thursday at Caroline's Café at 2 PM sharp. This new meeting is planned after Leo's scheduled date with a cat behind the café on the tenth. Andy also expressed eagerness to share his latest music project with Noor and Samantha, along with their AI project meeting this Sunday with Peter and Diego as previously discussed.

data.content: Talked to Mei at library around 2025-11-26 07:00

Andy: Hey Mei! It's great running into you at the library again. I was just thinking about our AI music project and wanted to discuss some ideas.

Mei: Hi Andy! Always a pleasure. I've been working on some new musical ideas myself, so let's catch up this Thursday under the oak tree at 2 PM. How does that sound?

Andy: That works perfectly for me. I'm looking forward to it! Let's also have lunch together afterwards like we planned earlier.
Talked to Samantha at school around 2025-11-26 12:00

Andy: Hey Samantha, I saw you at Caroline's Café yesterday. Remember we were discussing our AI project?

Samantha: Yes, we did. I have some updates regarding our progress. Would you like to discuss it today or reschedule for another day?

Andy: Let's meet today, how about 1 PM at the park under the oak tree? It's a great place to think and discuss, just like our first meeting.

Samantha: That sounds good, Andy. See you there at 1 PM sharp!
Talked to Diego at home around 2025-11-26 14:00

Andy: Hey Diego, it's good to finally catch up! I was thinking about our AI projects we discussed last week. Have you made any progress?

Diego: Hey Andy! Absolutely, I've been working on it every day since then. I even came up with a few new ideas I think we should discuss further. How about we meet at Caroline's Café next Tuesday at 3 PM to share our findings and brainstorm together?

Andy: That sounds perfect! I was actually planning to meet Mei there on Tuesday as well for another AI project discussion. How about if we join forces and have a combined meeting at 3 PM? We can grab some coffee and vegan street tacos while we're at it.
Talked to Samantha at park around 2025-11-26 15:00

Andy: Hey Samantha! I see you feeding those stray cats again. You're quite the animal lover, aren't you?

Samantha: Hi Andy, yes, it's something that brings me peace amidst all the coding. How was your conversation with Leo at the café yesterday?

Andy: It went well, we discussed our AI project meetings and events. Speaking of which, we have an upcoming quadruple date planned on October 27th at the park. Would you be available to join us then?

Samantha: That sounds nice. I'll make sure to add it to my calendar. Let's catch up properly this Friday at Caroline's Café, around 1 PM? I've rescheduled our AI project discussion for that day as well.

Andy: Perfect! Looking forward to it. And don't forget to bring your noise-cancelling headphones – I'd love to hear about the open-source libraries you maintain at night.
Talked to Peter at gym around 2025-11-26 16:00

Andy: Hey Peter! Good to see you at the gym again. I was just talking about you and your AI project with Leo at Caroline's.

Peter: Hey Andy! Funny running into you here. I guess we both have our routines. Speaking of that, Diego and I were thinking of discussing our AI music collaboration over there tomorrow afternoon at 2 PM. Care to join?

Andy: Absolutely! That works perfectly with my schedule. Let's make it official - Andy, Peter, Samantha, Noor, and Diego at Caroline's Café tomorrow at 2 PM. See you then!
Talked to Noor at hospital around 2025-11-26 17:00

Andy: Hey Noor, I didn't expect to see you here! It looks like fate has brought us together again.

Noor: Surprise indeed, Andy! But it seems we have some unfinished business with our AI project. How about we catch up over coffee at Caroline's Café? Let's meet there at 2 PM sharp today.

Andy: That sounds perfect, Noor. I can't wait to discuss my latest music ideas too! See you then.

Noor: Looking forward to it, Andy. And don't forget to bring your dented thermos of tea! I'll see you at 2 PM.

(Their upcoming meeting is now scheduled for 14:00 on November 26th at Caroline's Café.)

memory.summary: On November 26th, Samantha met with Caroline at a cafe and delivered cat food as promised. They discussed their respective AI projects, with Samantha sharing progress made with Andy and planning another meeting with him on the following Friday. Caroline also mentioned an upcoming AI music project collaboration involving Noor, suggesting they discuss it over coffee the next day at 1 PM. Subsequently, Samantha contacted Noor at school and invited her for a quick catch-up at Caroline's Café in an hour. Noor agreed to meet and they exchanged plans to bring snacks for the students.

memory.summary: On November 26th, Caroline has discussions about AI projects with Andy at the hospital late at night and invites Mei for a lunch meeting the next day at her café to share their work on an AI music project. They agree to meet at 1 PM, and Caroline also arranges coffee meetings with Andy and Diego at the café on the following days at 1 PM and 2 PM respectively. Around 2 AM, Caroline talks to Samantha at the café where they discuss a potential AI music project collaboration, set to meet over coffee the next day at 1 PM. On November 27th, Mei proposes meeting at the café at 2 PM for lunch to discuss details of the AI music project and brings seeds for Caroline's community garden.

data.content: Talked to Mei at theater around 2025-11-26 10:00

Caroline: Hey Mei, I didn't expect to see you here so soon! Your usual order ready?

Mei: Hi Caroline! Yes, please. A quiet corner today with my latte and a zine or two if you have any new ones.

Caroline: Of course! And I've got some exciting news – Leo and I were thinking about collaborating on a musical piece. We were hoping you could join us for dinner tomorrow at 8 PM?

Mei: That sounds wonderful, Caroline. Let's make it a night under the stars in our usual spot. See you then!

Caroline: Looking forward to it, Mei. And perhaps we can discuss your AI project further after dinner?

Mei: Absolutely, Caroline. Can't wait!

Caroline: Hey Peter, it's great seeing you again! I remember your usual latte with oat milk, right?

Peter: Absolutely, Caroline! You're still the best barista in town. And I see you've been busy with that AI music project. How did your meeting with Samantha go?

Caroline: It was fantastic! We're planning to work together more. Speaking of which, I invited Samantha and Leo to join us for a coffee before their meetings today at 2 PM. Would you mind if they tag along?

Peter: Not at all! That sounds like a great opportunity to collaborate further on the AI project. Let's make it official then – 2 PM sharp at your café, I can't wait!

Peter: Sounds perfect, Caroline. Thanks for being so accommodating. I really appreciate it! By the way, do you think we could discuss our plans with Andy and Mei on Tuesday at 1 PM under the oak tree? It would be great to have everyone together.

memory.summary: On November 26th, Peter communicates with Diego twice and also talks to Noor at the theater around 07:00. He reschedules his meeting with Samantha earlier in the day at Caroline's Café. Peter then invites Noor for a discussion about their AI music project at the same café right away, sharing that he'll bring his laptop. Noor agrees and mentions looking forward to making progress on the project together over coffee. Additionally, they confirm their double date under the oak tree this weekend remains on schedule. Peter recommends vegan street tacos at the market for a future get-together. The human initiates contact with Diego on November 26th at around 06:00.

memory.summary:
On November 25, Mei schedules various meetings with several individuals regarding AI discussions and collaborations, as well as community garden and zine club plans. At a café, she finalizes details about their unique music-related AI performance with Caroline, plans further collaboration, and discusses potential busking under an oak tree.

Mei also schedules a dinner meeting with Peter for the following evening around 7 PM, and discusses the AI music project with him, suggesting meeting at Caroline's Café the next day at 1 PM.

At the museum on November 25, Mei talks to Andy about their planned meeting at Caroline's Café the following day around 2 PM to discuss their AI music project further over lunch. During a library visit on November 25, Mei invites Noor to join their AI music discussions at Caroline's Café the following Friday at 2 PM.

During an evening theater visit on November 25, Mei proposes a coffee meeting next week at Caroline's Café on November 30th at 1 PM with Noor to discuss their AI project further and possibly busk under an oak tree afterwards. They also plan to catch up during their community garden and zine club meeting this Saturday at the park as usual.

Later, at a café on November 25, Mei talks to Diego about their music AI project, and he suggests meeting next Wednesday at 1 PM at the park for stretching exercises and rehab while working on their projects. He also mentions bringing treats for stray cats and catching up on community garden and zine club plans, promising street tacos for the meeting.

memory.summary: On November 26th, 2025, Diego had ten separate conversations. Alongside his discussions with Mei about their zine club and community garden projects, he also spoke with Caroline at a restaurant around 1 AM, Peter at the market around 2 AM, and Mei at home and at the theater. They discussed AI projects that they previously planned to discuss on Tuesday. Diego suggested meeting Caroline again at the café the following day at 2 PM, as it fits well between his gym class and his plans with Noor for street tacos. Their updated schedule now includes November 26th (at Caroline's Café), a meeting with Mei on the following Friday at 3 PM, an additional meeting with Peter at the same location on November 26th, at 3 PM, and a conversation with Peter at home around 6 AM where they discussed his AI music project. Peter shared exciting updates and proposed continuing their discussion over coffee at Caroline's Café that afternoon at 2 PM. Diego agreed, looking forward to hearing more about the project.

memory.summary:
On November 26th, Noor meets Andy at the train station earlier than planned for a coffee catch-up ahead of their AI project meeting under the oak tree next Tuesday. Andy proposes to meet today at 1 PM sharp at Caroline's Café and discuss his latest music project with Noor and Samantha. They agree to also share their findings from the AI project with Peter and Diego during this meeting.

Noor receives a message from Samantha around 3 AM on the same day, proposing a quick catch-up at Caroline's Café in an hour. They agree, and Noor reminds herself to bring kind notes and snacks for the students as well. Later that day, Noor talks to Leo at the restaurant around 4 PM, suggesting a meeting at Caroline's Café the next day at 3 PM for discussions on the AI project. They both confirm their attendance for this meeting.

(Added to their schedules: 2025-11-26 16:00 @ restaurant: Talking with Leo about AI project and 2025-11-27 15:00 @ cafe: Meeting with Leo for AI project discussions)

memory.summary: On November 25th, Leo and Samantha had a chance encounter at a train station followed by Leo meeting Caroline at the library around 7 PM. They discussed their respective days, including meetings about their AI project and a hospital encounter discussing a musical collaboration for Leo. Caroline invited Leo to join her for dinner at the café on November 26th at 8 PM, which he accepted, and they agreed to meet for coffee at Caroline's Café the following day at 11 AM as part of their scheduled AI project meeting with Noor, making it a date in addition to their project meeting. On the same day around 9 PM, Leo spoke to Noor at the train station who suggested getting together with Andy and Caroline to discuss the AI project further. They agreed to meet under the oak tree next Tuesday at 2 PM sharp for a discussion, followed by coffee at Caroline's Café at 1 PM beforehand. Noor appreciated the cozy atmosphere Leo maintained at school and expressed looking forward to their meeting. The group plans to make some magic happen with their AI project.

data.content: Talked to Andy at cafe around 2025-11-26 01:00

Andy: Hey Leo! I didn't expect to see you here so early. How's life been treating you?

Leo: Hey there, Andy! I was just passing by and thought I'd grab a coffee before my morning gigs. It's good to see you too. How have you been?

Andy: I've been great actually. Busy with the community project and preparing for our AI music collaboration with Samantha and Diego. Have we decided on a time to catch up about that yet?

Leo: Not officially, but how about we meet at Caroline's Café tomorrow at 2 PM? I know it's not exactly an hour, but it gives us plenty of time to discuss everything in detail. How does that sound to you?

Andy: That works perfectly for me! Let's do it. See you there tomorrow then.

Leo: Looking forward to it, Andy. Take care!

Andy: You too, Leo! And don't forget about our little park date with Noor and Samantha this week either. It'll be a blast!

Leo: No worries, Andy. I've been here since early morning busking. Heard your tunes while sketching the sunrise over the park.

Andy: That's amazing, Leo! I'd love to hear more about that musical collaboration we were discussing. How about we meet next Thursday at Caroline's Café at 2 PM sharp?

Leo: Sounds like a plan, Andy. I've got a date with the cat behind the café on the tenth, but let's grab coffee and share our ideas after that. See you then!

Noor: Hey Leo, it looks like our paths are crossing again! I was hoping to catch up with you about the AI project and some new developments.
